title: Green-AI Suite: AI Carbon Footprint Dataset
subtitle: Predict carbon emissions for AI model training with 85-95% accuracy using ensemble ML models
description: A comprehensive dataset for predicting carbon footprint, training time, and performance metrics of AI models. Includes 10,000+ synthetic records based on real-world benchmarks from GPT-3, BERT, ResNet, and other published AI training data. Features ensemble ML models (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost) achieving 85-95% accuracy.

resources.description: Main training dataset with AI model configurations and carbon emissions data
Complete ML pipeline with ensemble models and visualizations
